mission.title: keda: Upgrade controller-runtime dependency to v0.20.2 to not block downstream module imports
mission.description: Upgrade controller-runtime dependency to v0.20.2 to not block downstream module imports. This issue affects 8+ users.

steps.title: Identify keda upgrade symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your keda deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda -n keda --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review keda configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant keda configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
kubectl get configmap -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keda
```
As controller runtime has deprecated and removed the `webhook.Validator` interface.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Upgrade controller-runtime dependency to v0.20.2 to not…
steps.description:
As suggested in #6660, this PR replaces the deprecated `webhook.Validator` with `webhook.CustomValidator`.

The controller-runtime has not been updated yet, as the current version already supports `webhook.CustomValidator`.
```yaml
/api/v1alpha1/type_webhook.go:40:15: undefined: webhook.Validator
```

steps.title: Upgrade keda to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade keda:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade keda keda/keda --namespace keda
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n keda
helm list -n keda
```

steps.title: Confirm Upgrade controller-runtime dependency to v0.20.2… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda -n keda --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n keda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
As suggested in #6660, this PR replaces the deprecated `webhook.Validator` with `webhook.CustomValidator`.

The controller-runtime has not been updated yet, as the current version already supports `webhook.CustomValidator`.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with keda installed or the issue environment reproducible.
